base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dragon_quest_logo_en — a ui (menu_screen) from 1986 dragon quest. 'DRAGON QUEST' English wordmark — iconic Akira Toriyama-designed title text with purple stone-letters + crystal-sword overlay + sparkle glint. ®™ marks. Centerpiece of title screen. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
